<!-- Thanks for your PR! A few quick checks before you submit. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, in 1–3 sentences? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing behavior)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / internal

## How I tested it

<!--
  e.g. "Created a duel, invited a second user from incognito, both logged weight, leaderboard updated."
  UI changes: include before/after screenshots or a short screen recording.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] I've tested the happy path and at least one edge case
- [ ] New / changed UI respects `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] If I added a DB column or table: a migration file is in `supabase/migrations/`
- [ ] If I added env vars: `.env.example` is updated
- [ ] I've updated `CHANGELOG.md`
